settings.heading: College Fest Trophy Package
settings.subheading: Trophies and medals for every fest event — cultural, technical, sports and gaming — in one co-ordinated, sponsor-branded order. Fast turnaround for college fests across India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices; per-piece rates fall sharply at higher quantities. GST invoice included.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy bundles trophies and medals for every college-fest event — cultural, technical, sports and gaming — into one sponsor-branded order, from around ₹150 a trophy. Fast turnaround, delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: One bundle for the whole event
settings.text: A college fest spans cultural, technical, sports and gaming events, each needing winner and runner-up awards — often with sponsor branding and a tight timeline. We co-ordinate the whole set in one order: matching trophies and medals, your fest logo and sponsors engraved, delivered fast.

settings.title: Every event covered
settings.text: Cultural, technical, sports and gaming awards.

settings.title: Fest & sponsor branding
settings.text: Your fest logo and sponsor names on every award.

settings.title: Matching design
settings.text: One visual language across all categories.

settings.title: Share your award list
settings.text: WhatsApp us your categories, quantities and event date.

settings.title: Pick designs & budget
settings.text: We send matching options and a single combined quote.

settings.title: Approve engraving proof
settings.text: Confirm names, logos and titles on a digital mockup.

settings.title: Delivered together
settings.text: Co-ordinated, boxed and shipped pan-India in time for your event.

settings.question: Can you brand awards with our fest and sponsors?
settings.answer: Yes — fest logo, sponsor names and event titles are engraved free across the set.

settings.question: How fast can you deliver for a fest?
settings.answer: Standard sets ship in 5–7 business days after proof; tell us your date and we'll plan backwards.

settings.question: Can we mix trophies and medals?
settings.answer: Yes — winner trophies for headline events and medals for the rest, in one order.

settings.question: Do you provide a GST invoice?
settings.answer: Yes — one GST invoice, with documentation for college accounts.

settings.heading: Planning a college fest?
settings.text: Send your award list and date — we'll design a matching combo and quote, usually within the hour.
